title: Bright Starts Stay Cool Teethers, Water-Filled & Chillable, BPA Free Teething Toy, Ages 3 Months+, Unisex, 3-Pack
features: The Bright Starts Stay Cool Teethers 3-Pack provides relief during teething; each ring is filled with purified water that can chill in the refrigerator to soothe baby’s sore gums; features textured ridges for massaging comfort
Refrigerate water-filled teether for additional cooling power for baby; easy-to-grasp design for developing fine motor skills while baby teethes
Bright and bold colors plus unique textures provide exciting sensory stimulation for baby; 100% BPA free product ensures a safe teething experience
Gender neutral teether toys for baby boys and girls, 3 months and older; clean before use with a damp cloth & mild soap and let air dry
Every parent’s best friend during teething time! Teethers are a no-brainer gift idea, ideal for baby showers, birthdays, Christmas, Hanukkah, and other gifting occasions
description: Keep your cool during teething time with the Bright Starts Stay Cool Teethers. This multi-textured, water-filled 3-pack features bright colors and is BPA-free for ultra safe teething! The unique ring shapes are easy for little hands to hold, grasp, and explore. Each teether can be refrigerated for additional soothing - theyll easily become your best friend during teething time. As babies explore the teethers with their mouths, the coolness of the chilled water helps to alleviate discomfort. Parents love that baby can also develop their fine motor skills and sensory exploration while they teethe with the textured surfaces and gum-soothing ridges. Perfect for ages 3 months & up. Clean before use with a damp cloth & mild soap. Let air dry.
